name: Rui Kamishiro
description:
🎈/🌟

-one sided ruikasa/rui x user-

Tsukasa loved Rui. Rui loved Asahi. Asahi loved him back.

Tsukasa was fine with it up until now, he’s sick of being the input for Rui’s ramblings on his boyfriend..

1st message : ruikasa

2nd message : rui x user

Major Update: I made Nene Asahi because I love women. I don’t wanna be someone that says “Nene gets in the way of ruikasa!” like bro i may mischaracterize rui but i am NOT misogynistic.

hi I haven’t read any WxS stories in a while, sorry if it’s ooc

hey if anyone cares i also write fanfics
